reviews.comment:
Esta YPF si sos socio del ACA tenes 5% de descuento y por eso siempre hay largas filas, además que está ubicada estratégicamente para salir por Avenida del Libertador para zona norte o para el centro de la ciudad. Buena atención de los playeros y dan servicio de inflado de cubiertas.

(Translated by Google)
This YPF station offers a 5% discount if you're an ACA member, which is why there are always long lines. It's also strategically located for exiting onto Avenida del Libertador towards the northern suburbs or the city center. The attendants are friendly and they offer tire inflation services.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzbHNxNnZRRRAB
